WaitlistEntry.title: Waitlist Entry
WaitlistEntry.description: Represents a user who has joined the waitlist for a specific feature.

email.description: The email address of the user.

source.description: The feature the user is waiting for (e.g., 'temettu').

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined the waitlist.

NewsletterSubscriber.title: Newsletter Subscriber
NewsletterSubscriber.description: Represents a user who has subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The timestamp when the user subscribed.
